title: Bitcoin-Backed Loans Are Unlocking Homeownership for an Entire New Generation
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin-Backed Loans Are Unlocking Homeownership for an Entire New Generation

At the Bitcoin 2026 Conference, executives from SALT Lending and Peoples Reserve argued that Bitcoin-backed loans are emerging as a viable path to homeownership by letting holders leverage Bitcoin as collateral instead of selling it.

This post Bitcoin-Backed Loans Are Unlocking Homeownership for an Entire New Generation first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Steak ‘n Shake Says Bitcoin Payments Cut Processing Costs by 50%, Save $6 Million Annually
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Steak ‘n Shake Says Bitcoin Payments Cut Processing Costs by 50%, Save $6 Million Annually

Steak ‘n Shake exec Michael Boes told Bitcoin 2026 attendees that Bitcoin has become central to the chain’s turnaround, driving 2 million new customers, cutting costs, and helping fund a healthier menu overhaul.

This post Steak ‘n Shake Says Bitcoin Payments Cut Processing Costs by 50%, Save $6 Million Annually first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Bitcoin is Reshaping Traditional Finance, Industry Leaders Say
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin is Reshaping Traditional Finance, Industry Leaders Say

At Bitcoin 2026, a Nakamoto Stage panel made a simple but striking point: Bitcoin’s institutional growth is being driven by competitors who are actually working together, building the tools, products, and infrastructure needed to bring the asset into mainstream finance.

This post Bitcoin is Reshaping Traditional Finance, Industry Leaders Say first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: ‘This Time Is Different’: A First of Its Kind Documentary Covering Bitcoin’s Four Year Cycle, David Bailey, And Nakamoto in Production
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

‘This Time Is Different’: A First of Its Kind Documentary Covering Bitcoin’s Four Year Cycle, David Bailey, And Nakamoto in Production

A new documentary, This Time Is Different, will chronicle Bitcoin’s four-year cycle and David Bailey’s journey building Nakamoto Inc. through its public launch and market swings.

This post ‘This Time Is Different’: A First of Its Kind Documentary Covering Bitcoin’s Four Year Cycle, David Bailey, And Nakamoto in Production first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Strategy’s (MSTR) Michael Saylor Says STRC is ‘Going Viral’ After $8.5 Billion Run‑Up
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strategy’s (MSTR) Michael Saylor Says STRC is ‘Going Viral’ After $8.5 Billion Run‑Up

At Bitcoin 2026, Michael Saylor pitched STRC as a rapidly growing Bitcoin-backed credit product attracting billions from retail investors and aiming to scale digital credit as a major driver of Bitcoin adoption and price growth.

This post Strategy’s (MSTR) Michael Saylor Says STRC is ‘Going Viral’ After $8.5 Billion Run‑Up first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Bitcoin 2027 Conference Returning to Nashville, Tennessee
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin 2027 Conference Returning to Nashville, Tennessee

The Music City is set to host Bitcoin 2027, the world's largest Bitcoin gathering, on July 15–17, 2027

This post Bitcoin 2027 Conference Returning to Nashville, Tennessee first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
